ham.subject: Important Update: Company Leave Policy Effective July 1, 2024
ham.body:
Dear Team,

We hope you are well. The Human Resources department has finalized an update to our company leave policy, effective July 1, 2024. Please review the key changes below:

• **Annual Leave** – All full‑time employees will receive 20 days of paid vacation per calendar year, prorated for part‑time staff.
• **Sick Leave** – 10 days of paid sick leave per year, with a maximum of 5 consecutive days without a doctor’s note.
• **Parental Leave** – Maternity leave of 12 weeks, paternity leave of 2 weeks, and shared parental leave of up to 6 weeks.
• **Public Holidays** – All statutory public holidays remain paid; additional company‑wide holidays will be announced soon.
• **Leave Accrual** – Accrual will be calculated monthly and displayed in the employee portal.

We encourage you to log into the HR portal and update your personal information to ensure accurate leave tracking. If you have questions or need clarification, please contact the HR Help Desk at hr.help@company.com.

Thank you for your attention to this important update.

Best regards,

Human Resources Team
Company Inc.

spam.subject: URGENT: Outstanding QuickBooks Invoice – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Our records indicate that your QuickBooks subscription invoice (Invoice #87654321) has not been settled and is now overdue. Immediate payment is required to avoid interruption of services and potential late‑fee charges.

**Invoice Details**
• Amount Due: $249.99
• Original Due Date: June 15, 2024
• Current Status: Unpaid

Please complete the payment promptly by clicking the secure link below:

<URL>

Failure to pay within 5 business days may result in suspension of your QuickBooks account and loss of access to essential financial tools.

If you believe this notice is in error, please contact QuickBooks Billing Support immediately at billing.support@quickbooks.com.

Thank you for your immediate attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

QuickBooks Billing Department
